## LLM AND attack
| **Title** | **Date** | **Comment** |
| --- | --- | --- |
| **[The Range Shrinks, the Threat Remains: Re-evaluating LLM Package Hallucinations on the 2026 Frontier-Model Cohort](https://arxiv.org/abs/2605.17062v2)** | 2026-06-11 | <details><summary>13 pa...</summary><p>13 pages, 3 figures, 4 tables. v2: incorporates coordinated-disclosure feedback from PyPI Security and Socket.dev; registrable attack surface refined to 53 names (41 PyPI, 12 npm). Headline rates unchanged. Replication of Spracklen et al. (USENIX Security 2025). Data and code: https://github.com/churik5/slopsquatting-replication-2026 and https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.19859120</p></details> |
| **[One Token to Fool LLM-as-a-Judge](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.08794v3)** | 2026-06-11 |  |

| **[SMSR: Certified Defence Against Runtime Memory Poisoning in Persistent LLM Agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.12703v1)** | 2026-06-10 |  |
| **[Measuring Epistemic Resilience of LLMs Under Misleading Medical Context](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.12291v1)** | 2026-06-10 |  |
| **[Grammar-Constrained Decoding Can Jailbreak LLMs into Generating Malicious Code](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.11817v1)** | 2026-06-10 |  |
| **[Acoda: Adversarial Code Obfuscation for Defending against LLM-based Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.11755v1)** | 2026-06-10 |  |
| **[AttriGuard: Defeating Indirect Prompt Injection in LLM Agents via Causal Attribution of Tool Invocations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.10749v2)** | 2026-06-10 | <details><summary>Accep...</summary><p>Accepted by USENIX Security 2026</p></details> |
| **[SAIGuard: Communication-State Simulation for Proactive Defense of LLM Multi-Agent Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.12474v1)** | 2026-06-10 |  |
| **[Dummy Backdoor as a Defense: Removing Unknown Backdoors via Shared Internal Mechanisms for Generative LLMs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.11648v1)** | 2026-06-10 |  |
